HomeHeader.description: Let’s be real: <bold>AI is already writing the code you’re trying to learn.</bold> While you’re dreaming of a six-figure salary, the market is preparing you for <bold>minimum wage entry roles</bold>. We skip the fluff. From the drudgery of <bold>QA Fundamentals</bold> to the math-heavy hell of <bold>Three.js</bold>, this is a survival guide for the <italic>Post-Junior era</italic>.<block>Build what machines cannot imagine, or get replaced by a prompt.</block>

Footer.description: A project by <bold>Wiktor EXY. Kowalczyk</bold>. Built with <italic>Next.js</italic> and <italic>GSAP</italic>.

NotFound.description: The route you are trying to access does not exist in this reality. Either the URL is a hallucination, or we haven't engineered this path yet.
